items.title: New twist in Rajasthan Royals ownership as Indian businessman Laxmi Mittal acquires franchise
items.summary: The Mittlal family along with another businessman, Aadar Poonawala, are part of consortium which also includes Manoj Badale, the existing principal owner of RR
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
